awards.title: Men's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Felipe Valdo
awards.detail: Range: 25 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Men's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: Bruno Dirksen Orlandi
awards.detail: Volatility: 2.2 — nearly the same percentile every week
